word: H8587 - תַּעֲלֻמָּה - taʻălummâh - tah-al-oom-maw' - Thing that is hid

sections.paragraph:
Original: תּעלמּה

Transliteration: ta‛ălûmmâh

Phonetic: tah-al-oom-maw'

BDB Definition:

  1. hidden thing, secret, that which is hidden

Origin: from H5956

TWOT entry: 1629a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
